animation.insert_start: Add value {{value}} to the end of the array (index: {{index}})
animation.heapify_up_compare: Compare with parent: Current {{curVal}} vs Parent {{parentVal}}
animation.heapify_up_swap_min: Current node < Parent node, perform Swap
animation.heapify_up_swap_max: Current node > Parent node, perform Swap
animation.extract_swap_last: Swap Root with the last node
animation.extract_remove: Remove the last node and Heapify Down the new Root
animation.heapify_down_compare_min: Find the smaller child for comparison
animation.heapify_down_compare_max: Find the larger child for comparison
animation.heapify_start: Start Bottom-Up Heapify ({{length}} nodes total), Target: {{heapName}}

ui.insertReadyTooltip: Add value to the Heap (Heapify Up)
ui.needHeapifyTooltip: Please Heapify first to build a Max-Heap or Min-Heap
ui.extractReadyTooltip: Extract and remove the {{type}} value (Heapify Down)
ui.extractNeedHeapifyTooltip: Please Heapify first to extract the root node
ui.peekNeedHeapifyTooltip: Please Heapify first to peek at the root node
ui.heapifyTooltip: Convert unordered array to Heap (Bottom-Up Heapify)
ui.insertWarning: Please enter a value to Insert
